messages.noAccountsDesc: You don't have any accounts connected. Use `/accounts` to add one first.
messages.title: 🔄 Re-authenticate Account
messages.description:
Re-authentication allows you to update your account credentials without losing your bot data.

**When to use this:**
• Your token/credentials have expired
• You changed your password on the game website
• You're experiencing authentication errors

**What it does:**
• Updates your stored credentials
• Keeps your daily claim settings
• Preserves your notification preferences

Choose your account below to re-authenticate:
messages.methodChoiceDesc:
**Email & Password (Recommended)**
Automatically fetches your credentials using your game account email and password.

**Token Only**
If you have a fresh account token, you can provide it directly.
messages.tokenHelpTitle: 🔑 How to Get Your Account Token
messages.tokenHelpDescription:
> To begin login to your skport account
https://www.skport.com/

> Once logged in open the dev tools using F12 on your keyboard

> On the tabs, select the one that says Application tab or storage tab on specific browsers

> On the left hand side, select cookies and click on the website to view all your site cookies

> Then click on the one that says ACCOUNT_TOKEN and click on the bottom show URL decoded and then copy the token
messages.error: An error occurred while loading your accounts.
